label: KILOS Comp Audit Source Element Target Plan Capture Planning Bundle

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes all bullets for messaging, tone, campaigns, job listings, social channels, reviews, and awards.
The clip excludes the full slide frame and does not include unrelated deck chrome.
The text extract preserves the scope list as separate bullet-like entries.

provenance.natural_language_target: Clip the bullet list describing audited surfaces and assessment dimensions, excluding the title, surrounding whitespace, and page number.

acceptance_criteria: Exactly four clips are produced, one per labeled block.
Each clip includes its label and body text.
No clip includes the entire slide or another labeled block.

provenance.natural_language_target: Clip each labeled narrative block as its own element so downstream data can preserve the source distinction between shared themes, differentiators, gaps, and visual identity.

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes the table headers and all visible company rows on the page.
The clip preserves headline-to-company alignment.
The clip does not include adjacent page number or unrelated margins.

provenance.natural_language_target: Clip the messaging snapshot table body that pairs companies with headlines and example positioning copy.
provenance.artifact_location: PDF page 5, 'Employer brand messaging snapshot insights'

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes all five KILOS column headings.
The clip preserves matrix rows and score markers well enough to trace theme placement.
The clip is not a full-page grab.

provenance.natural_language_target: Clip the KILOS top-themes matrix as the matrix element only, preserving the five KILOS column headings and visible theme labels.

acceptance_criteria: The target points back to editable slide objects as source structure.
No screenshot, deck export, or generated slide artifact is produced.
Later extraction fields remain nullable until a PPTX object parser or codegen pass fills them.

provenance.natural_language_target: Record the editable deck as the structural source for the same precise element targets found in the rendered PDF; do not create slide exports.
provenance.artifact_location: PPTX source deck, corresponding rendered pages 2, 4, 5, and 6

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes the visible view controls and enough header context to identify the audit surface.
The clip does not include the full browser viewport.
The active-view styling is visible for the selected state used during capture.

provenance.natural_language_target: Clip the sticky header navigation element that controls the SPA views.

acceptance_criteria: Exactly two clips are produced: one for the audit introduction and one for methodology/framework context.
The method clip includes the KILOS framework explanation when visible.
Neither clip includes the whole overview page.

provenance.natural_language_target: Clip the intro and methodology cards/elements separately after the Overview view has rendered.

locator_hints.codegen_hint: set activeView to competition, then locator('#competition-content-wrapper > .card')

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes the grid title and all visible company logo tiles.
The clip excludes the rest of the competition page if additional sections are present.
The company count can vary in later audits; this target is a repeated-grid element, not a fixed company schema.

provenance.natural_language_target: Clip the logo grid element that shows the complete company set represented by the SPA.

locator_hints.codegen_hint: set activeView to competition, then locator('#kilos-matrix')

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes the KILOS matrix title and table content.
The clip preserves company columns and KILOS dimension grouping.
The clip is scoped to #kilos-matrix, not the full KILOS page.

provenance.natural_language_target: Clip the KILOS matrix element after switching to the KILOS view.

acceptance_criteria: Exactly five clips are produced for the selected company: Kinship, Impact, Lifestyle, Opportunity, and Status.
Each clip includes the dimension label, summary, and supporting evidence when present.
Clips are accordion-panel scoped and do not include the entire company deep-dive section.

provenance.natural_language_target: For a selected company deep dive, open and clip one accordion panel for each KILOS dimension.
provenance.artifact_location: SPv5.html, each rendered company deep-dive KILOS Framework Analysis block

locator_hints.codegen_hint: set activeView to deepdives, then locate the company section by its slug id

acceptance_criteria: One clip is produced for each rendered company deep-dive section in SPv5.
The clip count is data-driven by the rendered company set; SPv5 currently has 13 company sections.
Each clip is section scoped and not a full-page or full-viewport screenshot.

provenance.natural_language_target: Clip each generated company deep-dive card as a separate element, preserving the company logo/header, value proposition, KILOS analysis column, and evidence column boundaries.

acceptance_criteria: The clip includes at least one numbered citation bubble and the related expansion control when present.
The text extract identifies the source URL or citation index relationship when visible.
The clip is scoped to the citation cluster, not the whole paragraph or page.

provenance.natural_language_target: Clip a representative citation-control cluster showing numbered source bubbles and expansion affordance.
provenance.artifact_location: SPv5.html, rendered citation controls from citeList() and cite()
